# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-api
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-payments-api
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: payments-api
      namespace: payments
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-shipping-api
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: shipping-api
      namespace: shipping
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-api
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-from-orders-api
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: orders-api
      namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-from-shipping-api
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: shipping-api
      namespace: shipping
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: shipping-api
  namespace: shipping
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: shipping
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: shipping-from-orders-api
  namespace: shipping
spec:
  server:
    name: shipping-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: orders-api
      namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: shipping-from-payments-api
  namespace: shipping
spec:
  server:
    name: shipping-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: payments-api
      namespace: payments
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-api
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-from-orders-api
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: orders-api
      namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-from-payments-api
  namespace: inventory
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: payments-api
      namespace: payments
